Subject Therapy was built for 1913. We built Ritual for today.
Behind the Ritual
N
Nir Shtern
Co-Founder, OurRitual

Hi [First Name],

Recently, I was thinking about the traditional model of couples therapy. You know the drill: driving across town in the middle of a workday, sitting on a couch for exactly 50 minutes, and paying $400 for the privilege, with zero support in between.

"This system was designed in 1913. It was built for a world that no longer exists."

Today, couples are juggling demanding careers, childcare, and endless notifications. Trying to fit an outdated, rigid therapy model into a modern schedule often just becomes another stressor.

That's why David and I built OurRitual — to give you gold-standard relationship support that actually fits into your real life, on your terms, whether you have 40 minutes for a session or just 5 minutes for an exercise.

Warmly, Nir Shtern
The Deep Dive

Article of the Month

On Substack · This Month's Read
Therapy Was Designed
for 1913

The traditional therapy model is fundamentally broken for the modern couple. It requires you to pause your life to get help. In our latest Substack article, we explore why relying on a century-old mental health model might be holding your relationship back — and how shifting to a modern, flexible, continuous skills-based approach can finally help you create lasting change.

Ask an Expert

Your Questions,
Answered

From the Community

"My partner and I desperately need to work on our communication, but we legitimately don't have the time or energy for weekly therapy. What can we do?"

You don't need a clinical 50-minute hour to make progress. Intimacy and communication are built in micro-moments. Instead of trying to carve out a massive block of time, start with small, asynchronous habits. Use the OurRitual app to do a 2-minute 'Emotion Check-In' or a quick guided journal prompt while drinking your morning coffee. Consistent, 5-minute investments compound much faster than an exhausted, rushed weekly meeting.

P
Priya
OurRitual Expert Therapist

What's New

Your App Experience,
Upgraded

📅
Just Launched
Better Scheduling Flexibility

More evening and weekend slots across our expert team. You can now book multiple sessions at once — plan ahead without the back-and-forth.

⏱️
Just Launched
Tailored Session Lengths

Only have a lunch break? Book a standard 40-minute session. Need to unpack something bigger? Select experts now offer extended 60-minute sessions.

✨
Just Launched
Journeys: Plan Your Full Path

Instead of one pathway at a time, you can now build a full Journey — up to three pathways planned ahead, so your growth has direction and continuity.

After each session, get a personalised reflection to help you stay connected to your progress and maintain engagement between live sessions.
